hooks.description: adlc-flow bootstrap: verify .claude/CLAUDE.md (fail if missing) + canonical artifacts presence (warn). Cross-platform Node implementation.

Artifact-integrity check: when canonical ADLC artifacts (HYPOTHESIS / RESPONSIBILITY-MAP / FEEDBACK-LOG / MODEL-UPGRADE-LOG / OBSERVABILITY / COST-BUDGET) are edited, verify last_updated stamp is current. Warn-only.
